---
title: "Shiny App"
subtitle: "A Study in Breach"
toc: false
---

The CSM TraceForce application, A Study in Breach, is live. Open it in a new tab at [myvaa.shinyapps.io/VAA_ShinyApp](https://myvaa.shinyapps.io/VAA_ShinyApp/), or use it embedded below. The [User Guide](user-guide.qmd) walks through the five tabs and what each one does.

[Launch the app in a new tab](https://myvaa.shinyapps.io/VAA_ShinyApp/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

<iframe src="https://myvaa.shinyapps.io/VAA_ShinyApp/"
        width="100%" height="820"
        style="border:1px solid #e8c4d4; border-radius:.6rem; margin-top:1rem;"
        loading="lazy"
        title="A Study in Breach Shiny application">
</iframe>
